valueText: Join us for a day of food, fellowship, and fun for the whole family. Bring a dish to share and come meet your parish community.

Bring the whole family and join us for our parish picnic! It's a wonderful chance to catch up with old friends, welcome new faces, and enjoy a relaxing day together as one St. Rose family. There'll be plenty of food, great company, music, and a scavenger hunt for the kids.
detailsNote: Burgers and hot dogs provided — bring a side to share and a lawn chair or two!

photos.alt: Parishioners and their pastor together at a past St. Rose picnic
Friends gathered at a past St. Rose picnic
Kids serving themselves at the picnic food table

cta.introText: Add your name and email below to save your spot. We'll send you a calendar invite, event details, and a reminder before the picnic.
cta.successMessage: You're on the list! Keep an eye on your inbox for a calendar invite and a reminder before the picnic.
